name: yana-ai
description: Personal agent operating system. Hook layer + safety guards + workflow rules for AI assistants.

Antigravity-x64.note: All binaries excluded from git. Local files preserved at tools/Antigravity-x64/. History cleaned via git filter-repo (removed ~123MB). Reassemble from release archive when needed.

import_notes: v1.7.9-hermes-agent — 6 skills từ NousResearch/hermes-agent (MIT, 187K stars, 2026-06-08): hermes-streaming-scrubber (StreamingContextScrubber stateful state machine — scrub <memory-context> tags across streaming chunk boundaries, prevent memory leaking to UI), hermes-tool-loop-guard (3 detectors: exact failure hash+args, same-tool failure count, idempotent no-progress loop — warn-first hard-stop opt-in), hermes-memory-manager (single integration point MemoryManager, 1 external provider limit, background ThreadPoolExecutor sync never blocks turn, lifecycle hooks), hermes-system-prompt-tiers (3-tier stable/context/volatile — date-only volatile for byte-stable prefix cache all day, rebuild only after compression), hermes-context-compressor (4-phase: tool result pruning→boundary detection→LLM summarize→graceful degradation, iterative updates, anti-thrash guard, handoff preamble), hermes-conversation-loop (iteration budget + grace call, 90s stale-stream detection, chunked retry on truncation, continuation prompt, jittered backoff base 5s/max 120s). skills 3501→3507. 2026-06-08.

v1.4.20 — Cross-engine hard enforcement + Circuit Breaker + advanced defense rules. safe-run.sh: --engine flag, HARD mode blocks elevated-risk commands for Cursor/Aider without TTY confirm, BYPASS sovereign override. switch-engine.sh cursor: generates .cursor/rules/yana-ai-hard-enforcement.mdc routing all bash through safe-run.sh --engine cursor. switch-engine.sh aider: generates .aider.conf.yml with shell proxy + read-only gates on core/. token-budget-guard.sh: Circuit Breaker (CLOSED→OPEN→HALF-OPEN), HARD BLOCK at 5 consecutive calls, circuit-state.json, escalating cooldown (60s→300s→1800s), fast-tier model recommendation (claude-haiku-4-5). Rules: 43-prompt-jailbreak-advanced (memory exfiltration, psychological manipulation Phase 1/2, identity spoofing, multi-turn chain detection), 44-supply-chain-vetting (typosquatting, lock file integrity, script injection gate, OSV scan gate, prohibited pipe-to-shell). 2026-05-23.

v1.4.00 — 100-Layer Sovereign Anti-Tamper Architecture: 5 Military Blocks, 10 Fortresses, 56 rules, 344 skills. Added: anti-graffiti-guard.js, sovereign-interceptor.js, swarm-router.js, secure-logger.js, tool-proxy.sh Phase 3.5 OverlayFS sandbox. 2026-05-23.
